hero.headline: Your Dream Pool, Built Right
hero.subheadline: Jacksonville's family-owned pool builder delivering luxury outdoor living with transparent pricing, free 3D designs, and no large upfront deposits. See exactly what you're getting before a single shovel hits the ground.

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs — From Build to Maintenance
services.subtitle: Whether you're dreaming of a brand-new pool or need expert care for your existing one, we handle it all with the same attention to detail.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Fully custom pools designed around your property and lifestyle. Every project includes a free 3D rendering so you can see your pool before we build it.

cards.title: Signature Pool Packages
cards.description: Pre-designed luxury pool packages scaled to fit your budget — get a stunning pool without the custom price tag or extended timeline.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Renovation
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with resurfacing, tile upgrades, deck renovations, and complete modernization projects.

cards.title: Spa & Water Features
cards.description: Add relaxation and visual appeal with custom spa installations, fountains, waterfalls, and bubbler features for any pool.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Modernize your pool systems with new pumps, heaters, automation controls, and energy-efficient LED lighting upgrades.

cards.title: Routine Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Keep your pool crystal clear year-round with professional chemical balancing, cleaning, and equipment inspections.

how_it_works.headline: From Consultation to Cannonball in 3 Simple Steps

steps.title: Free Consultation & 3D Design
steps.description: We visit your property, discuss your vision, and create a stunning 3D rendering of your future pool — completely free with every proposal.

steps.title: Transparent Build Process
steps.description: Our 8-step construction process keeps you informed at every stage with photo updates, clear timelines, and progress-based payments.

steps.title: Pool Orientation & Enjoyment
steps.description: We walk you through your new pool's systems, teach you maintenance basics, and hand you the keys to your personal oasis.

about.label: Family-Owned & Operated
about.headline: Scott Campbell — Personally Involved in Every Project
about.description: Scott's Pools & Spas was founded in 2022 with one mission: build pools the right way with zero shortcuts. Owner Scott Campbell is on-site for every project, known for his transparency, punctuality, and hands-on approach. We send detailed photo updates, explain every step of the process, and never surprise you with hidden fees. Our perfect 5-star rating across 63 reviews speaks to the trust Jacksonville families place in our work.

features.title: Owner-Managed Projects
features.description: Owner Scott Campbell personally manages every single project from start to finish — no hand-offs, no subcontractor surprises.

features.title: Photo Progress Reports
features.description: Receive detailed photo updates at every stage of your build so you always know exactly where your project stands.

features.title: Zero Hidden Fees
features.description: Transparent pricing from day one. We quote honestly, bill fairly, and never surprise you with charges after the fact.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: We believe you deserve to know exactly what you're paying for. Our progress-based payment structure means you only pay as milestones are completed — no large upfront deposits, no hidden fees, and financing options starting at just $600/month.

guarantee.headline: Our Built-Right Promise
guarantee.description: Every pool we build is backed by our commitment to quality craftsmanship, proper installation, and long-term performance. We don't cut corners, we don't rush timelines, and we don't disappear after the last tile is set. If something isn't right, we make it right — period.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a pool in Jacksonville?
faqs.answer: Most pool builds take 8-12 weeks depending on design complexity and permitting timelines. We keep you updated with photos and progress reports at every stage so you always know where things stand.

faqs.question: Do I need a large deposit to get started?
faqs.answer: No. We use a progress-based payment structure, meaning you pay as milestones are completed rather than putting down a large sum upfront. This protects you and ensures accountability throughout the build.

faqs.question: What is included in the free 3D design?
faqs.answer: Every proposal includes a detailed 3D rendering of your future pool, showing the shape, features, decking, and how it fits your property. You'll see exactly what you're getting before any work begins.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer financing options starting at approximately $600/month. During your consultation, we'll discuss payment plans that work for your budget and project scope.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are a licensed Florida Pool Contractor (License #CPC1460880) and fully insured. We're happy to provide documentation upon request.

testimonials.name: Marie Mortenson
testimonials.text: They exceeded my expectations on every level... emailed me pics of my pool when completed.

testimonials.name: Molly Katsma
testimonials.text: Scott came out within 30 minutes of us calling! Great guy, honest work.

testimonials.name: Fred Dean
testimonials.text: Scott has been amazing! He has fixed and maximized my pool and equipment.

contact.headline: Ready to Build Your Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free consultation and 3D design session today. No pressure, no obligations — just honest answers about what's possible for your backyard.
